description: Create a new standard VeraCrypt encrypted file container. Use the VeraCrypt GUI to create a 50MB encrypted file container at /home/ga/Volumes/secret_archive.hc. Use AES encryption with SHA-512 hash algorithm, FAT filesystem, and set the password to 'SecurePass2024'. Complete the Volume Creation Wizard by clicking 'Create Volume', selecting 'Create an encrypted file container', choosing 'Standard VeraCrypt volume', specifying the file location and size, setting the encryption options and password, and formatting the volume.
